entities.name: HABROBRACON HEBETOR
entities.description: A polyphagous larval parasitoid used to control lepidoptera larvae.

entities.name: SPODOPTERA FRUGIPERDA
entities.description: A lepidopteran pest also known as the fall armyworm (FAW).

entities.name: CORCYRA CEPHALONICA
entities.description: A factitious host used for the mass culture of Habrobracon hebetor.

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL CONTROL
entities.description: The use of living organisms to suppress pest populations.

entities.name: PARASITISM
entities.description: The act of a parasitoid developing in or on a host organism.

entities.name: MASS REARING
entities.description: The process of producing large quantities of a biological control agent.

entities.name: LARVAL INSTARS
entities.description: The developmental stages of insect larvae.
